long_description:
[TEL]-fluentbit-qradar count no output records [US-SOUTH-STAGE] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL:                    https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/tel_fluentbit_logging_pipeline_unhealthy_agent.html
TIP Situation:                      Observed fluentbit-qradar count no output records issue in telemetry-ng-fluentbit-qradar
TIP Short Description:              some fluentbit-qradar pods in rias-ng-us-south-dal12-preprod have had no output records for the last twelve hours
TIP Console:                        toc
TIP Self Healing:                   false
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds:   3600
TIP CRN:                            crn:v1:staging:public:is-platform-integration:us-south::rias-ng-us-south-dal12-preprod::

Event Generated:

Severity:            sev-3
Metric:
    count by (kube_cluster_name) ( avg by (kube_cluster_name,kube_pod_name,kube_node_name,host_hostname) (increase(fluentbit_output_proc_records_total{name=~"out_qradar_ds_all|out_syslog_all", kube_daemonset_name="fluentbit-qradar"}[12h]) ) < 1 ) > 0 = 3.00
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'rias-ng-us-south-dal12-preprod'

Time:                12/04/2025 01:41 AM UTC
State:               Triggered

------

Triggered by Alert:
